name: pi-random-session-name
description: Pi extension that names sessions with random three-word names.
readme:
# pi-session-name

Pi extension that names unnamed sessions with random three-word names, like `amber river stone`.

## Install

```bash
pi install npm:pi-random-session-name
```

## Local use

```bash
pi -e /absolute/path/to/pi-session-name
```
